title: 7th sqllitelogictest crash :(
poc: CREATE TABLE tab1(col0 INTEGER, col1 INTEGER, col2 INTEGER);
CREATE TABLE tab2(col0 INTEGER, col1 INTEGER, col2 INTEGER);
SELECT ALL - COUNT ( * ) + - 12 * - COUNT ( * ) AS col2 FROM tab2, tab1 AS cor0;
key_bug_features: Invalid SQL syntax in SELECT statement
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE tab1(col0 INTEGER, col1 VARCHAR(50), col2 DATE NOT NULL);
